policy: one route-level replay contract per manifest canonical route; executable fixtures may be ProtoKit-backed or explicitly planned, but every lane must point at reusable DSK resources, events, methods, snapshots, descriptors, and renderer-free deterministic replay direction
promotionGate: A route earns replay priority when its behavior is generic enough to become or validate a reusable domain communication boundary rather than route-local JavaScript.

replayLanes.requiredReplayShape: checkpoint/cargo/pressure input sequence with genericRouteCargoExtraction route ledger, cargo state, pressure deltas, success/failure snapshots, and descriptor hashes
move/look/scan input sequence with scan progress, zone pressure, hazard events, objective state, and descriptor hashes
harvest/build/unlock sequence with resource-node ledger, structure validation, completion state, pressure wave, and descriptor snapshots
pitch/bank/boost/checkpoint input sequence with position and velocity envelope, checkpoint ledger, camera descriptor, and terrain-window descriptors
pickup/gear/horde sequence with spawn cadence, resource ledger deltas, hazard pressure, health outcome, and HUD descriptor hashes
build/upgrade/wave/combat sequence with economy ledger deltas, core health, wave outcome, and renderer-agnostic HUD/world descriptors
harvest/build/wave/core/extraction sequence with inventory ledger, route/cargo extraction state, wave pressure, and extraction result descriptors

canonicalRouteReplays.hostRole: bridge semantic input, tick route-progress DSKs, keep cargo/resource/pressure planned, and render snapshots only

protoKitReplayCoverage.coverage: atomic route/checkpoint/objective-progress smoke for ordered checkpoint state, events, snapshots, and route-checkpoint descriptors
composite delivery/extraction smoke over generic route progress, cargo/resource ledger, pressure channels, snapshots, and route/cargo/pressure descriptors

missingExecutableFixtures: cargo/resource/pressure deterministic replay lane that imports generic-route-cargo-extraction-kit and proves the remaining delivery/extraction boundary beyond the now-consumed route-progress DSK
localJsReductionOpportunity: replace remaining cargo, tether, or pressure route-local bookkeeping with generic-route-cargo-extraction-kit children after a metadata/spec smoke is in place
keep browser collision, camera, Three.js rendering, route fiction, and input bridges in the host while ProtoKits own ledgers and descriptors

canonicalRouteReplays.hostRole: bridge movement/look/scan input and render survey descriptors only

protoKitReplayCoverage.coverage: generic pressure and affordance replay primitives that survey-pressure routes can compose

missingExecutableFixtures: scan-zone-hazard route-level replay with objective descriptor hashes
localJsReductionOpportunity: move scan target registration and zone pressure ticks behind survey DSK boundaries
emit hazard and objective state as events/snapshots rather than route-local objects

canonicalRouteReplays.hostRole: compose existing kits, provide presets/config, and render descriptors without owning kit logic

protoKitReplayCoverage.coverage: resource and affordance primitives needed by field-engineer composition

missingExecutableFixtures: harvest/build/unlock replay mapped to resource-node, build-placement, objective, and pressure boundaries
localJsReductionOpportunity: move field-engineer composition presets into reusable kit config
replace route-owned objective bookkeeping with completion-ledger snapshots

canonicalRouteReplays.hostRole: bridge flight input and render camera/terrain/checkpoint descriptors only
localJsReductionOpportunity: move flight envelope validation and checkpoint ledger into aerial traversal DSKs
emit camera and terrain-window descriptors from ProtoKits

canonicalRouteReplays.hostRole: bridge movement/combat/gear input and render survival descriptors only

protoKitReplayCoverage.coverage: generic resource, pressure, action-window, and affordance primitives that survival ecology can compose

localJsReductionOpportunity: move pickup and gear ledgers into reusable resource/action boundaries
express horde spawn cadence and hazard pressure as headless events/snapshots

canonicalRouteReplays.hostRole: consume generic-defense descriptors and keep 2.5D presentation/browser ownership outside reusable kit logic

protoKitReplayCoverage.coverage: seven named generic-defense DSK boundary aliases with resources, events, methods, snapshots, and descriptors
build, upgrade, wave, combat, reward, vital breach, and renderer-agnostic descriptor replay

routeExecutableReplayCoverage.coverage: route-domain executable replay imports real Core plus ProtoKits generic-defense DSK aliases, runs fixed ticks against the Signal Bastion debug preset, and compares deterministic descriptor/resource digests without browser ownership

localJsReductionOpportunity: replace route imports of the broad composite with the smallest generic-defense DSK aliases where safe
keep cel renderer, HUD layout, audio, assets, and pointer/browser controls in the host

canonicalRouteReplays.hostRole: bridge action/build/extraction input and render descriptors while reusable ledgers/directors live in ProtoKits

protoKitReplayCoverage.coverage: generic resource, action-window, pressure, and affordance replay primitives for extraction-defense composition

localJsReductionOpportunity: move inventory/material ledger and harvest interaction into reusable boundaries
turn portal/extraction state into route-progress/cargo-extraction snapshots
